hero_subtitle: SFTY Government helps regulators connect fragmented market data into secure supervisory workflows that preserve evidence, support case management, and streamline oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision falters when data remains isolated
problem_description: Regulators managing digital asset markets face challenges from fragmented data and disconnected sources. This impedes clear oversight, delays supervisory response, and weakens the audit trail necessary for evidence-based regulation.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects data from VASP, licensing, KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, alerts and cases into a unified supervisory layer that supports structured workflows, evidence preservation and audit-ready oversight.
workflow_title: From market signals to supervisory actions
workflow_description: SFTY moves fragmented market signals through classification, case creation, review, evidence capture and supervisory decisions within one secure oversight workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. One supervisory layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY helps regulators move beyond fragmented wallet data by connecting licensing, transaction activity, risk signals, cases and evidence into one coherent supervisory environment.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports government regulators with secure deployment, role-based access and evidence-grade logging to enable structured, auditable and procurement-ready supervisory operations.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory workflows connect market signals to cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade records support audit-ready regulatory decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe secure deployment options for government digital asset supervision
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for government regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators a connected platform connecting licensing, wallet activity, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule data and supervisory cases into a structured digital asset oversight environment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VASP supervision workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures signals from wallets, alerts and licensing into cases with workflows for review, escalation, supervisory actions and reporting workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence with audit logs to support review readiness and defensible supervisory outcomes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate multiple data providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects and normalizes outputs from KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics providers into a single supervisory operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing supervisory tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing supervisory and analytics systems by layering their data into structured workflows without replacing underlying tools.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects supervisory data, case records and evidence to support secure regulatory modernization.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
